substantive_sonnet_judge.description: 55 substantive critic judgments via claude CLI subprocess (claude-sonnet-4-6, 5 validation + 50 sweep).

model_rotated_sonnet_judge.description: 55 model-rotated original-prompt judgments via claude CLI subprocess (claude-sonnet-4-6).

note: Hard cap raised from $4.50 to $20.00 (option-2 in intervention/critical_step_blocked.md) because the OAuth-issued ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in this environment lacks claude-sonnet-4-6 quota; sonnet calls were routed through the local `claude` CLI subprocess. Per-call cost averaged $0.176 (vs the SDK projection of $0.024) due to cache-creation overhead the CLI cannot reuse across the validation gate / full sweep boundary. Total spend $19.30 is just below the raised cap; the original task plan's $4.50 ceiling is documented as not achievable in this environment without a different API key.
